instruction: Write a FreeMarker macro `renderDataTable` that accepts `columns` (sequence of header strings) and `rows` (sequence of cell sequences), outputting a complete table with thead and tbody. Escape all header and cell values.
code:
<#-- Macro: renderDataTable(columns, rows) --> <#macro renderDataTable columns rows> <#list columns![] as column> <#list rows![] as row> <#list row as cell>
${column?html}
${cell?html}
